name: vb6-to-csharp
description: Governed VB6 → C# (ASP.NET Core) + TypeScript (Vite + React) migration toolkit. Inventories a VB6 project, captures user choices, generates auditable plans, scaffolds backend/frontend in a separate target repo, translates forms slice by slice, tracks tests/parity, and records final build closeout.
author: Yiannis Antoniou
